entries.source: We discussed different topics.
entries.reference: Iba-iba ang ating pinag-usapan.

entries.source: He runs very fast.

entries.source: We're going to win.

entries.source: Nobody taught me.

entries.source: I like spring.

entries.source: I come here every day.

entries.source: I want a blue cake.
entries.reference: Gusto ko ng isang keyk na bughaw.

entries.source: What are you talking about?

entries.source: I need a little time to reflect upon it.
entries.reference: Kailangan ko ng kaunting panahon para pagmuni-munihan ito.

entries.source: How much do you know about the process?
entries.reference: Gaano karami ang nalalaman mo tungkol sa proseso?

entries.source: We'll have to separate the wires.
entries.reference: Kailangan nating paghiwalayin ang mga alambre.

entries.source: I don't know anything about your job.
entries.reference: Wala akong alam tungkol sa trabaho mo.

entries.source: Tom is staying at a nearby hotel.
entries.reference: Tumutuloy si Tom sa kalapit na otel.

entries.source: Do those girls wear white skirts?
entries.reference: Ang mga batang babaeng iyon ba ay nakapaldang puti?

entries.source: There is no smoke without fire.
entries.reference: Kung saan may usok, may apoy.

entries.source: What did you have for breakfast?
entries.reference: Anong inalmusal mo?

entries.source: I don't use taxis unless it's absolutely necessary.
entries.reference: Hindi ako sumasakay ng taksi maliban na lang kung talagang kinakailangan.

entries.source: I know one of them but not the other.
entries.reference: Kilala ko ang isa sa kanila pero hindi yung isa.

entries.source: Of all the languages I've studied, French was the most difficult.
entries.reference: Sa lahat ng mga lengguwaheng inaral ko, ang Pranses ang pinakamahirap.

entries.source: I am busy; otherwise I would accept your invitation.
entries.reference: Abala ako, dahil kung hindi, tinanggap ko na sana ang imbitasyon mo.

entries.source: Who are you and where do you come from?
entries.reference: Sino ka at saan ka galing?

entries.source: I bought a dozen spoons and two dozen forks.
entries.reference: Nagdala ako ng isang dosenang mga kutsara at doble pa ng mga tinidor.

entries.source: I'll have to get my parent's permission to go to the dance with you.
entries.reference: Kailangan kong magpaalam sa mga magulang ko para pumunta sa sayawan kasama mo.

entries.source: Who is taller, Ken or Taro?
entries.reference: Sinong mas matangkad, si Ken o si Taro?

entries.source: I was born in Argentina, but I was educated in Brazil.
entries.reference: Ipinanganak ako sa Arhentina, pero sa Brasil ako pinag-aral.

entries.source: When real life friends desert us, books are always ready to offer friendship, sympathy and motivation.
entries.reference: Kapag iniiwan tayo ng mga kaibigan sa tunay na buhay, palaging handa ang mga librong magbigay ng pakikipagkaibigan, ng pagmamalasakit at ng motibasyon.

entries.source: He hurried out the door, and accidentally forgot the key at home.
entries.reference: Nagmadali siya palabas ng pintuan at nakalimutan niya ang susi sa bahay.

entries.source: If you leave now, you'll be in Boston by tomorrow evening.
entries.reference: Kung luluwas ka ngayon din, bukas nang gabi ay nasa Boston ka na.

entries.source: Goethe claimed, "one who cannot speak foreign languages does not know one's own language either".
entries.reference: Sabi ni Goethe, "Ang sinumang di marunong ng wikang dayuhan ay di rin alam ang sariling wika."

entries.source: We lost our way, and what was worse, we were caught in a shower.
entries.reference: Nawala kami ng daan, at ang mas masama pa'y inabutan kami ng ulan.

entries.source: If God doesn't exist in our world, then I will create God with my own hands.
entries.reference: Kung walang Diyos sa mundo natin, puwes gagawa ako ng Diyos gamit ang sarili kong mga kamay.

entries.source: No matter how good you are, there will always be people who are better than you.
entries.reference: Kahit gaanong magaling ka, palaging may taong higit na magaling kaysa sa iyo.

entries.source: Really, who doesn't want to be a princess? All you really need is a good plumber, and you're set!
entries.reference: Yung totoo, sino ba ang may ayaw maging prinsesa? Ang kailangan mo lang talaga ay isang magaling na tubero at handa ka na!

entries.source: What is the price?
entries.reference: Ano ang presyo?

entries.source: Does the price include accommodation?
entries.reference: Kasali na ba ang manirahan sa presyo?

entries.source: Land prices are sky-high in Japan.
entries.reference: Abot-langit ang presyo ng mga lupa sa bansang Hapon.

entries.source: This radio is out of order.
entries.reference: Sira itong radyo.

entries.source: You returned the shirt because it was too small, didn't you?
entries.reference: Isinauli mo ang damit dahil maliit talaga, hindi ba?

entries.source: My teachers like me.

entries.reference: Mayroon akong takdang-aralin.

entries.source: Will he fail the examination?
entries.reference: Babagsak kaya siya sa pagsusulit?

entries.source: I was a teacher for fifteen years.
entries.reference: Guro ako nang labinlimang taon.

entries.source: He asked his teacher several questions.
entries.reference: Tinanong niya ang propesor nang maraming beses.

entries.source: Did you do your homework by yourself?
entries.reference: Magsarili mo bang ginawa ang homework mo?

entries.source: The assignment was too much for me.
entries.reference: Masyadong mahirap ang takdang-aralin.

entries.source: Everything depends on whether you pass the examination.
entries.reference: Nakadipende ang lahat sa kung ika'y papasa sa eksamen.

entries.source: I should never have become a teacher.
entries.reference: Hindi ako dapat naging guro.

entries.source: Tom's dream is to go to a university in England.
entries.reference: Ang pangarap ni Tom ay makapunta sa isang unibersidad sa Inglatera.

entries.source: I want to become a teacher.
entries.reference: Gusto kong maging guro.

entries.source: As far as I know, he's a diligent student.
entries.reference: Sa pagkakaalam ko, siya ay isang masipag na estudyante.

entries.source: He was caught cheating on the exam and got called on the carpet.
entries.reference: Nahuli siyang nangongopya sa pagsusulit at pinagalitan.

entries.source: Judge by the result.
entries.reference: Husgahan mo ang resulta.

entries.source: Who's your lawyer?
entries.reference: Sino ang abogado mo?

entries.source: Tom wants to call his lawyer.
entries.reference: Gustong tawagan ni Tom ang kanyang abogado.

entries.source: He is the lawful owner of the company.
entries.reference: Siya ang legal na may-ari ng kompanya.

entries.source: You can't go against the laws of nature.
entries.reference: Hindi ka makakasalungat sa batas ng kalikasan.

entries.source: If you can't get a lawyer who knows the law, get one who knows the judge.
entries.reference: Kung hindi mo kayang kumuha ng abogadong nakakaalam ng batas, kumuha ka ng nakakakilala sa hukom.

entries.source: If you were forced to sign it, the contract is invalid.
entries.reference: Kung pinilit kang pumirma, walang bisa ang kontrata.

entries.source: Maybe in a different universe, our basic five senses are useless and we would require different senses altogether.
entries.reference: Marahil sa ibang sansinukob, ang ating basikong limang mga pandama ay walang kuwenta at pawang mangangailangan tayo ng ibang mga pandama.

entries.source: Tom is patient with me.
entries.reference: Mapagpasensiya si Tom sa akin.

entries.source: You need to be more patient.
entries.reference: Kailangan mong maging mas mapagpasensiya.

entries.source: An investigation was launched.
entries.reference: Naglunsad ng imbestigasyon.

entries.source: The Greeks used to worship several gods.
entries.reference: Iba't-ibang diyos ang sinasamba rati ng mga Griyego.

entries.source: There were errors.
entries.reference: Nagkaroon ng mga pagkakamali.

entries.source: He requested help.
entries.reference: Humingi siya ng tulong.

entries.source: You'll need some help.
entries.reference: Kakailanganin nila ng tulong.

entries.source: I didn't say I would help you.
entries.reference: Hindi ko sinabing tutulungan kita.

entries.source: Tom thanked Mary for her help.
entries.reference: Pinasalamatan ni Tom si Mary para sa kanyang tulong.

entries.source: Thank you so much for the help.
entries.reference: Maraming salamat sa tulong.

entries.source: Should you require further information, please do not hesitate to contact me.
entries.reference: Kung sakaling nais mo pa ng higit na impormasyon, huwag kang magdalawang-isip na tawagan ako.

entries.source: Without his help, you'd have failed.
entries.reference: Mabibigo ka sana kung hindi ka niya tinulungan.

entries.source: It really happened.
entries.reference: Nangyari nga ito.

entries.source: Your letter made me happy.
entries.reference: Pinasaya ako ng sulat mo.

entries.source: Open the door.
entries.reference: Buksan ninyo ang pinto.

entries.source: Bob was very happy.
entries.reference: Masayang-masaya si Bob.

entries.source: He tried to appeal.
entries.reference: Sinubukan niyang umapela.

entries.source: This is a happy occasion.
entries.reference: Masayang okasyon ito.

entries.source: What time does it open?
entries.reference: Anong oras nagbubukas?

entries.source: Please open the package.
entries.reference: Pakibukas ng balutan, nga.

entries.source: I'm very happy to see you.
entries.reference: Masayang masaya ako na makita kita.

entries.source: I saved a lot of money.
entries.reference: Marami akong naipong pera.

entries.source: Well, what happened to her?
entries.reference: Oh, ano'ng nangyari sa kanya?

entries.source: I don't want this to happen again.
entries.reference: Ayaw kong mangyari ito muli.

entries.source: They are happy with the result.

entries.source: Damn it! I forgot my password!
entries.reference: Putangina! Nakalimutan ko ang password ko!

entries.source: The audience clapped when the concert was over.
entries.reference: Pumalakpak ang mga tagapanood pagkatapos ng konsiyerto.

entries.reference: Kinain ni Tom ang mansanas na iniwan ni Mary sa ibabaw ng hapag-kainan.

entries.source: I'm so happy, I feel like I could fly.
entries.reference: Sa sobrang saya ko, pakiramdam ko kaya kong lumipad.

entries.source: Please shut the door.
entries.reference: Pakisara ng pinto.

entries.source: There are big stones on the ground.
entries.reference: May malalaking bato sa lupa.

entries.source: You shot Tom twice.
entries.reference: Dalawang beses mong binaril si Tom.

entries.source: I read some books.

entries.source: Precise measurements are necessary.
entries.reference: Mga eksaktong sukat ang kinakailangan.

entries.source: Do you guys know him?
entries.reference: Kilala mo ba siya?

entries.source: He has great confidence in himself.
entries.reference: Malaki ang tiwala niya sa kanyang sarili.

entries.source: She warned the children not to play on the street.
entries.reference: Pinaalalahanan niya ang mga batang huwag maglaro sa kalye.

entries.source: They believe you.
entries.reference: Naniniwala sila sayo.

entries.source: Both of the children won a prize.
entries.reference: May napanalunang premyo ang parehong bata.

entries.source: Have him wait a moment.
entries.reference: Pahintayin siya nang sandali.

entries.source: Deliver us from evil.
entries.reference: Ilayo mo kami sa masama.

entries.source: Get outta here!
entries.reference: Layô!

entries.source: I'm not bald.
entries.reference: Hindi ako kalbo.

entries.source: My name is Ludwig.
entries.reference: Ang pangalan ko ay Ludwig.

entries.source: I couldn't sleep well.
entries.reference: Hindi ako nakatulog ng maayos.

entries.source: In her youth, my mother was very beautiful.
entries.reference: Noong bata pa ang nanay ko, napakaganda niya.

entries.source: Sometimes miracles still happen.
entries.reference: Nangyayari pa rin minsan ang mga himala.

entries.source: Is he asleep?
entries.reference: Natutulog ba siya?

entries.source: There are almost no books.
entries.reference: Halos walang mga libro.

entries.source: Tom never said no.
entries.reference: Hindi kailanman humindi si Tom.

entries.source: It's been two years since she left me.
entries.reference: Dalawang taon na ang nakaraan sapul nang iwanan niya ako.

entries.source: His cottage is on the coast.
entries.reference: Nasa dalampasigan ang kasita niya.

entries.source: Sales have decreased these days.
entries.reference: Humina ang benta sa mga araw na ito.

entries.source: Everybody was looking for Tom.
entries.reference: Hinahanap ng buong mundo si Tom.

entries.source: When does the movie start?
entries.reference: Kailan magsisimula ang palabas?

entries.source: Sounds good to me.
entries.reference: Ang gandang pakinggan nito.

entries.source: It's he, isn't it?

entries.source: I haven't had lunch.
entries.reference: Hindi pa ako nananghalian.

entries.source: Burj Khalifa is currently the tallest skyscraper in the world.
entries.reference: Ang Burj Khalifa ay ang pangkasalukuyang pinakamataas na gusali sa mundo.

entries.source: Did you win the race?
entries.reference: Ikaw ba ang nanalo sa karera?

entries.source: I know a shorter route.
entries.reference: May alam akong mas maiksing ruta.

entries.source: He likes his school a lot.
entries.reference: Talagang mahal niya ang paaralan niya.

entries.source: A boy like Tom doesn't deserve a girl like Mary.
entries.reference: Hindi karapat-dapat ang isang lalaki gaya ni Tom sa isang babae gaya ni Mary.

entries.source: I didn't see him.
entries.reference: Hindi ko siya nakita.

entries.source: Does your friend like tea?
entries.reference: Gusto ba ng tsa ang kaibigan mo?

entries.source: Keep to the left.
entries.reference: Sa kaliwa ka lang.

entries.source: The water came up to my waist.
entries.reference: Umabot ang tubig sa baywang ko.

entries.source: How's things at the office?
entries.reference: Kumusta na sa opisina?

entries.source: I can solve the problem by myself.
entries.reference: Kaya kong lutasin ang problemang ito nang sarili ko.

entries.source: He was given a gold watch as a reward.
entries.reference: Nakatanggap siya ng gintong relo bilang gantimpala.

entries.source: Tom isn't up yet.
entries.reference: Hindi pa gising si Tom.

entries.source: The man denied having stolen the car.
entries.reference: Itinanggi ng lalaki na ninakaw niya ang sasakyan.

entries.source: I own this property.
entries.reference: Pag-aari ko ang lupaing ito.

entries.source: Look at me when I talk to you.
entries.reference: Tingnan mo ako pag kinakausap kita!

entries.source: How much longer will the thunderstorm last?
entries.reference: Gaano pa katagal ang bagyo?

entries.source: I wish I'd never sung that song.
entries.reference: Sana hindi ko na lang kinanta ang kantang ito.

entries.source: He is still sleeping.
entries.reference: Natutulog pa siya.

entries.source: You were brave.
entries.reference: Ang tapang mo.

entries.source: The chicken was dry.
entries.reference: Tuyo ang manok.

entries.source: We're going to die.
entries.reference: Mamamatay tayo.

entries.source: Sorry, I missed the train.
entries.reference: Patawad, hindi ko inabutan ang tren.

entries.source: I'm always looking at you.
entries.reference: Lagi kitang tinitignan.

entries.source: I looked around me.
entries.reference: Tiningnan ko ang paligid ko.

entries.source: The river flows between the two countries.
entries.reference: Dumadaloy ang ilog sa pagitan ng dalawang bansa.

entries.source: You're on to something.
entries.reference: May alam ka.

entries.source: He has an interesting book.
entries.reference: May nakakatuwang libro siya.

entries.source: I've got to go out.
entries.reference: Dapat lumabas ako.

entries.source: The identity of the boy who had been missing was verified by the clothes he was wearing.
entries.reference: Ang pagkakakilanlan ng nawalang bata ay pinatunayan ng suot niyang damit.

entries.source: The annoying advertiser called my house.
entries.reference: Tumawag yung nakakainis na advertiser sa amin.

entries.source: John is two years older than me.
entries.reference: Mas matanda nang dalawang taon si John kaysa sa akin.

entries.source: That just goes to show that you are a liar.
entries.reference: Pinapatunayan niyan na isa kang sinungaling.

entries.source: Please sit here.
entries.reference: Maupo po kayo rito.

entries.source: No person by that name is listed in the register of the school.
entries.reference: Walang lumalabas na taong may ganyang pangalan sa listahan ng eskuwela.

entries.source: I don't feel like filling out this questionnaire. There are too many items.
entries.reference: Parang ayaw ko sagutan itong questionnaire. Masyadong maraming tanong.

entries.source: Forget about him.
entries.reference: Kalimutan mo na siya.

entries.source: He gave me tea without sugar.
entries.reference: Binigyan niya ako ng tsa nang walang asukal.

entries.source: She always keeps her room neat and tidy.
entries.reference: Palaging maayos ang silid niya.

entries.source: The town slept.
entries.reference: Nahihimbing ang bayan.

entries.source: Three of the bodies had gunshot wounds.
entries.reference: Tatlo sa mga bangkay ay may mga tama ng bala.

entries.source: I am peeling apples.

entries.source: He turned over a new leaf in life.
entries.reference: Nagbagong-buhay na siya.

entries.source: I was told to go home.
entries.reference: Sinabihan ako na umuwi na.

entries.source: It looks as if it is going to rain.
entries.reference: Parang uulan.

entries.source: To many, change seems inevitable.
entries.reference: Para sa marami, hindi maiiwasan ang pagbabago.

entries.source: Tom hit me.
entries.reference: Tinamaan ako ni Tom!

entries.source: You may have swelling, but don't worry about it.
entries.reference: May maga ka nga, pero huwag kang mag-alala.

entries.source: What's the difference?

entries.source: One thing you should know about me is that I hate exercising.

entries.source: You know people.

entries.source: Don't tell me you still trust Tom.
entries.reference: Huwag ninyong sabihing nagtitiwala pa rin kayo kay Tom!

entries.source: Tom rented a room.
entries.reference: Nagrenta si Tom ng kuwarto.

entries.source: We played baseball.
entries.reference: Naglaro kami ng beysbol.

entries.source: Come and see me tomorrow.
entries.reference: Pumarini ka at magkita tayo bukas.

entries.source: A stench emanated from the rotting corpses.
entries.reference: Umalingasaw ang naaagnas na bangkay.

entries.source: There was nothing left in the refrigerator.
entries.reference: Walang natira sa ref.

entries.source: He always sings while taking a shower.
entries.reference: Palaging kumakanta siya sa pagliligo.

entries.source: I didn't go into the cave with Tom.
entries.reference: Hindi ako pumasok sa kuweba kasama ni Tom.

entries.source: I feel more alert after drinking a cup of coffee.

entries.reference: Maraming mga muwebles sa kuwarto.

entries.source: I'm losing my grip.

entries.reference: Sinulat niya ang sarili niyang pangalan.

entries.source: How many are in your party?

entries.source: Julia kisses her daughter.
entries.reference: Hinalikan ni Julia ang kanyang anak.

entries.source: You're my friend.
entries.reference: Ikaw ang aking kaibigan.

entries.source: I explained the process to him.
entries.reference: Ipinaliwanag ko ang proseso sa kanya.

entries.source: That's my intention.

entries.source: My hair is clumsily cut.

entries.source: Nobody saw me.
entries.reference: Walang nakakita sa akin.

entries.source: I can't bend my right arm.

entries.reference: Hindi lahat ng ibon ay gumagawa ng pugad.

entries.source: Write an essay on "Friendship".
entries.reference: Magsulat ng sanaysay tungkol sa "Pagkakaibigan".

entries.reference: Gusto niyang tumira sa Hilagang Amerika.

entries.source: Do you care what other people think about you?
entries.reference: May pakialam ka ba sa anong iniisip ng ibang tao tungkol sa iyo?

entries.source: Don't speak ill of your classmates.

entries.reference: Dati ko pang gustong pumunta sa Australya kasama ang aking pamilya.

entries.source: Give it back.
entries.reference: Ibalik mo iyan.

entries.source: I will be working all day tomorrow.
entries.reference: Ako ay magtatrabaho buong araw bukas.
